hooks.statusMessage: codeidx: prefer SQLite FTS / symbols over raw Grep/Glob when searching code structure
codeidx: after C# saves, add prose to `.codeidx/notes/*.md` via MCP (`get_or_create_note` then `append_note` under `## Notes` — not in `.cs` files)

hooks.command: C:\ProgramData\anaconda3\python.exe -m codeidx hook session-start --db C:\Code\NPC\.codeidx\db\codeidx.db --repo C:\Code\NPC
